transcription.text: There's an article in this recent issue of Time magazine, very interesting, especially if you want to stop smoking. They're about these tablets, Flavettes they're called. They're safe, they're non-habit forming. Now whenever you get the urge to smoke, you take a Flavette instead. It tastes good too, just let it dissolve and that urge to smoke begins to disappear. You take fewer and fewer as you go along until first thing you know you're rid of the tobacco habit and Flavettes really work too. Hundreds of smokers have tried them, smokers who couldn't stop through willpower alone, but with a little willpower plus Flavettes, more than three out of four of these people did stop smoking or cut down substantially. And best of all, you won't put on weight because Flavettes also curb that big appetite you get when you stop smoking. You can get Flavettes at any drugstore, they're made and guaranteed by the Norwich Pharmacol Company. So if you want to stop smoking, you give these a try. Flavettes.
